name: Point Law Co., LPA
description_short: Point Law Co., LPA is a debt relief provider based in Columbus, Ohio. Rated 3.8/5 with 60 Google reviews, reflecting solid customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Point Law Co., LPA is a debt relief provider serving clients in Columbus, Ohio. Carrying a 3.8/5.0 Google rating from 60 reviews, Point Law Co., LPA has an solid reputation among consumers in the Columbus area looking to manage and reduce their outstanding debts.

Operating as a law firm, Point Law Co., LPA provides a range of services for consumers seeking debt relief solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

Debt relief services in Columbus can range from debt management plans to settlement negotiations. Point Law Co., LPA should be evaluated based on their fee structure, success rate, and how their program may affect your credit score. Legitimate debt relief providers are typically registered with the state, and consumers should verify credentials and check for complaints with the CFPB and state attorney general before enrolling in any program.

Consumers in the Columbus, Ohio area who are considering Point Law Co., LPA should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any debt relief provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
